smsConsent.label: I consent to receive SMS notifications and alerts from {{companyName}}. Message frequency may vary. Msg & data rates may apply. Reply <stop>STOP</stop> to unsubscribe at any time. Reply <help>HELP</help> for help.

auth.headline: Okwogera n'okuwandiika okw'ekyama eri buli muntu, buli w'ali
auth.description: Okukwata ku by'okukwata ku by'ekyama okw'ekyama, okukyusa olulimi mu nnimi 100+, obubaka obugenda okugwa, n'okuyimba n'okulaba n'okuwandiika.

feature.encryption: Okukwata ku by'okukwata ku by'ekyama okw'ekyama
feature.disappearing: Obubaka obugenda okugwa & okukwata ku by'okukwata
feature.privacy: Okukwata ku by'ekyama okusooka. Ebyo byaffe, oli nawe okukola.

hero.line1: Okwogera n'okuwandiika okw'ekyama eri buli muntu, buli w'ali — n'okukyusa olulimi mu nnimi
hero.sub: Funa ennamba ey'ekyama ey'omugaso okuyimba n'okuwandiika mu nsi yonna ku Wi-Fi oba data. Yigiriza okukwata ku by'okukwata ku by'ekyama, obubaka obugenda okugwa, n'okuyimba n'okulaba n'okuwandiika mu ngeri ey'ekyama — n'ebikozesebwa eby'okukwata ku by'okukwata ku by'ekyama.
hero.freeNote: Okuwandiika n'okuyimba ku bwereere. Ebikozesebwa bya AI n'ebikozesebwa bya premium byetaagisa okugula.

feat.encryption: Okukwata ku by'okukwata ku by'ekyama, buli kiseera
feat.translate: Genda ku nsonga ez'okukyusa olulimi mu nkola yo
feat.disappear: Obubaka obugenda okugwa & okukwata ku by'okukwata
feat.privacy: Okukwata ku by'ekyama okusooka. Ebyo byaffe, oli nawe okukola.

profile.themeFreeNotice: Oli ku Free—kozesa Sun/Moon options wansi. Genda ku premium okufuna n'ebirala.
profile.backupDesc: Back up ekisumuluzo kyo eky'ekyama okukyusa obubaka bwo ku kyuma ekirala mu ngeri ey'ekyama.
profile.freePlanCopy: Oli ku free plan. Genda ku premium okufuna ebikozesebwa ebirala ng'okuzimbisa, ennamba ez'okwongera, n'ebikozesebwa by'ekyama eby'okukozesa.
profile.portalOpenFailed: Tesobola kugulawo billing portal. Gezako nate.
profile.followHint: Stories zaabwe z'olaba mu Following feed yo nga baposa n'audience Followers (oba Public).
profile.callTextForwardingDescription: Forward incoming calls and texts to your verified phone or email. Outgoing calls/texts can show your Chatforia number.
profile.errSmsDest: Londa at least one destination (phone or email).
profile.errQuietHours: Quiet hours must be between 0 and 23.
profile.ageBandHint: Tereka age range (te tukwata ku date of birth yo ey'omugaso). Eno ekozesebwa okukwata ku Random Chat pairings mu ngeri ey'omugaso.
profile.wantsAgeFilter: Kozesa age-based matching mu Random Chat
profile.wantsAgeFilterDesc: Nga kiri ku, tufuba okukwata ku bantu abali mu age ranges ez'omugaso.
profile.partnerAgeBandsDesc: Teens bagattibwa na teens zokka. Abakulu tebagattibwa na teens.
profile.teenMatchingNote: Ku safety, akaunti eziri mu 13–17 age range zikkirizibwa okugattibwa na 13–17 zokka mu Random Chat.
profile.foriaRememberDesc: Nga kiri ku, Foria esobola okukozesa eby'okwogera by'ewaffe eby'eddako (ku yo zokka) okukwata ku conversation. Osobola okukyusa anytime.
profile.voicemailAutoDeletePlaceholder: Leka nga kiri empty okukwata forever
profile.voicemailGreetingTextDesc: Ekozesebwa nga audio greeting yo tekinna kubawo.
profile.voicemailGreetingUploaded: Voicemail greeting yateekebwa mu ngeri ey'omugaso
profile.voicemailNote: Voicemails okuva ku nnamba yo eya Chatforia ziteredwa mu Voicemail inbox yo. Osobola okutandika transcription ne forwarding ku plans ez'omugaso.
profile.portHint: Wagala okukwata ennamba yo ey'eddako? Osobola okugitta mu Chatforia Wireless.

Visual alerts for messages & calls
Show banners and title blink so you don’t miss activity.

Vibrate on new messages (when supported)
Trigger device vibration with notifications.
accessibilitySettings.flashOnCall:
Flash screen on incoming call
Brief bright flash when a call rings.

free.title: Free
free.desc: Tandika okwogera n'okuwandiika ku bwereere. Kirungi nga oli mu kugeza Chatforia.

features.chat: Real-time 1:1 n'group chat, n'okuyimba n'okulaba n'okuwandiika
features.media: Share photos, voice messages, n'short videos
features.ai: AI-powered smart replies n'instant translation (fair use)

plus.title: Plus
plus.desc: Byonna eby'omugaso, nga tewuli ads. Kirungi ku everyday messaging n'okuyimba.

features.allFree: Byonna mu Free, nga tewuli ads
features.forwarding: Forward calls n'texts ku nnamba yo ey'omugaso

premiumMonthly.title: Premium (Monthly)
premiumMonthly.desc: Full Chatforia experience: AI power tools, customization, n'priority support.

features.themes: Funa all premium color themes n'app customizations
features.ai: Premium-only AI power tools ku rewrites, smart replies, n'summaries

premiumAnnual.title: Premium (Annual)
premiumAnnual.desc: Save nnyo nga bill yearly — n'ebirala color themes, AI tools, n'priority support.

features.allPremium: Byonna mu Premium Monthly — n'ebirala color themes
features.bestFor: Best ku power users, remote workers, n'heavy travelers
features.number: Keep your Chatforia number protected while your plan is active

premiumAnnual.disclaimer: Billed upfront. Saza anytime. Tewali hidden fees.

marketing.premiumMonthlyDesc: Full features, ringtones, n'AI power tools.

mobile.title: Chatforia Mobile (eSIM data packs)
mobile.subtitle: Yongera global data Chatforia ekye nga tewuli ku Wi-Fi. Prices zikyuka ku country yo n'currency.
mobile.subtitle.detail: Londa one-time global data pack Chatforia ekye nga oli mu travel oba ku bweru ku Wi-Fi.

features.throttle: Speeds ziyinza okukendeera ku high usage

unlimited.title: Unlimited pack
unlimited.bestFor: Best for heavy use where supported.

disclaimer.devices: eSIM data packs zeetaaga eSIM-compatible n'unlocked device. Availability ekyuka ku phone model, carrier, n'country. Coverage n'speeds zikyuka ku region.
disclaimer.fairUse: Subject to fair-use policy n'local limits

compare.title: Compare eSIM data packs
compare.disclaimer: Actual data usage ekyuka ku ngeri gy'okozesa Chatforia (voice, video, media, n'ebirala apps ku simu yo).

hero.subcopy: Instant eSIM data for travel, backup connectivity, and staying reachable away from Wi‑Fi.

mobile.choosePackSubtitle: Pick the coverage zone and amount of data that fits your trip or everyday backup needs.

feature.2: One-time data packs with clear pricing
feature.3: Use Chatforia when Wi‑Fi is unavailable

region.localSubtitle: Best for staying connected in one country.
region.europeSubtitle: Great for trips across supported European countries.
region.globalSubtitle: Best for international travel across multiple regions.

small.title: Starter pack
small.bestFor: Short trips, light messaging, n'occasion calls

medium.title: Traveler pack
medium.bestFor: Weekend trips, regular VoIP calls, n'maps

large.title: Power pack
large.bestFor: Heavy chat, calls, video, n'hotspot use

xl.title: XL pack
xl.bestFor: Best for extended travel and frequent video or media use.

family.title: Chatforia Family (shared data)
family.subtitle: Gatta single data pool ku family yo. Bill emu, multiple Chatforia accounts, global coverage.

small.title: Family Small
small.desc: Includes 20 GB shared high-speed data — great ku 2–3 light users.

medium.title: Family Medium
medium.desc: Includes 40 GB shared high-speed data — ideal ku 3–5 active members.

large.title: Family Large
large.desc: Includes 80 GB shared high-speed data — ku power families eziri online buli kiseera.

feature.shared: Shared data pool ku family yo
feature.fairUse: Subject to fair-use policy n'local limits

family.disclaimer: Family packs kolawo oba top up shared data pool. Osobola okuyita n'okusaza members anytime.
family.footnote: Family packs zagatta single data pool ku linked Chatforia accounts. Availability n'limits ekyuka ku country yo n'local regulations.

why.title: Lwaki abantu bakyusa ku Chatforia
why.subtitle: Chatforia ekuwa ennamba ey'omugaso, smart translation, n'eky'okugenda ku ad-free nga oli ready.

textnow.title: Chatforia vs TextNow
textnow.body: Lighter ads ku Free, simple Plus upgrade nga oli ready, n'Premium tools TextNow tekozesa.

voice.title: Chatforia vs Google Voice
voice.body: Modern app, global-first design, n'built-in translation mu kifo ky'old-school call forwarding.

messengers.title: Chatforia vs chat apps
messengers.body: Wandiika ku real phone numbers — si ab'okwogera mu app zokka — n'AI n'status. Kirungi nga ova ku apps ng'TextFree oba TextMe.

why.disclaimer: Comparison based on publicly available information era eyinza okukyuka. Ebintu ebirala eby'okwogera n'okuwandiika ng'TextFree oba TextMe bifaanana nnyo ne TextNow.

free.a: Yee. Free plan ekuwa Chatforia number, calling, n'messaging n'ads. Osobola okukwata ku Free nga gwe oyagala, oba genda ku premium okusaza ads n'okufuna ebikozesebwa ebirala.

plusPremium.q: Kiki eky'enjawulo ku Plus ne Premium?
plusPremium.a: Plus esaza ads n'eyongera message history — perfect ku everyday use. Premium eyongera customization, AI tools ku rewrites n'replies, n'priority support ku heavy users.

esim.a: Chatforia Mobile ekozesa global eSIM coverage. Availability ekyuka ku country yo n'device. Olaba options ez'omugaso mu kiseera ky'activation mu app.

cancel.q: Nsobola okusaza oba okukyusa plans anytime?
cancel.a: Yee. Osobola okukola oba okusaza subscription yo okuva ku billing page mu app. Changes zikola ku end ya current billing period.

family.a: Family packs kolawo shared data pool ku multiple Chatforia accounts. Omuntu emu ebill, era osobola okuyita oba okusaza members n'okuteeka limits ku buli muntu.

h2.app: Tandika n'free, ad-supported plan. Genda ku ad-free n'Plus, oba ffuula full power features n'Premium.

randomChat.title: Random Chat
randomChat.subtitle: Meet someone new instantly, or choose to chat with Ria.
randomChat.description: Chat anonymously first. Add Friend later if it feels right.
randomChat.setAge: Set your age range in Profile → Age & Random Chat to be matched with people.
randomChat.waitingAddFriend: Waiting for them to accept Add Friend…
randomChat.hiddenUsernames: Usernames stay hidden until both people choose Add Friend.

randomChat.saveGuard: Only human-to-human chats can be saved
randomChat.ageDisclaimer: We only store an age range (not your exact date of birth). This is used to keep Random Chat pairings reasonable. To match with people (not just RiaBot), set your age band in Settings → Age & Random Chat.
randomChat.ageBandRequired: Set your age range in Profile → Age & Random Chat to be matched with people.
randomChat.ageBandCallout: To match with people (not just RiaBot), set your age band in Settings → Age & Random Chat.

privacy.a: Yee. Obubaka n'okuyimba by'okukwata ku by'ekyama by'ekyama bya default. Gwe n'omuntu ow'okufuna gwe muba musobola okusoma.

translate.a: Tandika “Auto-translate” mu Settings → Appearance & Language. Tukyusa on-device nga kiri supported, oba ku secure APIs n'minimal metadata.

contact.a: Tuwe support@chatforia.com. Yongera screenshots n'app version yo.

chatSafely.title: How to Chat Safely Online
chatSafely.intro: Online communication has made it easier than ever to connect with people across the world. Whether you're messaging friends, meeting new people, or collaborating professionally, messaging platforms play a major role in everyday life. However, staying safe online is just as important as staying connected.

personalInfo.title: Protect Your Personal Information
personalInfo.body: One of the most important rules of online safety is to avoid sharing sensitive personal information. This includes your home address, financial details, passwords, or any identifying information that could be misused. Even in casual conversations, it's best to be mindful of what you share and who you share it with.

safetyFeatures.title: Use Built-In Safety Features
safetyFeatures.body: Modern messaging platforms like Chatforia provide tools to help users stay safe. Features such as blocking, reporting, and privacy controls are designed to give users control over their experience. If someone behaves inappropriately or makes you uncomfortable, you should use these tools immediately.

scams.title: Be Aware of Scams
scams.body: Scammers often use messaging platforms to trick users into sharing personal information or sending money. Be cautious of messages that seem too good to be true, such as unexpected offers, urgent requests, or unfamiliar links. Always verify the identity of the person you're communicating with before taking any action.

responsibly.title: Communicate Responsibly
responsibly.body: Respectful communication helps create a safer environment for everyone. Avoid engaging in harmful or abusive conversations, and be mindful of how your words may affect others. Positive interactions contribute to a better experience for all users.

whySafety.title: Why Online Safety Matters
whySafety.body: As digital communication continues to grow, maintaining safety and trust becomes increasingly important. By following basic safety practices and using available tools, users can enjoy the benefits of messaging while minimizing risks.

chatSafely.conclusion: Staying safe online doesn’t require advanced technical knowledge—just awareness, caution, and good judgment. With the right habits, you can communicate confidently and securely.

about.title: Ku bya Chatforia
about.description: Chatforia eri secure, multilingual messenger n'end-to-end encryption, instant translation, n'voice/video calling. Mission yaffe eri nnyangu: yamba abantu okukwata — mu ngeri ey'ekyama, ey'ekyama, n'okukyusa olulimi.

values.control: Control: Disappearing messages & read receipts nga optional.
values.control_aria: Control: Disappearing messages n'read receipts nga optional.

about.howDescription: Obubaka bukwaatiddwa ku kyuma kyo nga tebuvudde ku kyuma. Translation, backups, n'device sync by'okukozesa okukendeera kye server zaffe ziyinza okulaaba.
about.privacyDesc: End-to-end encryption and privacy controls are built into Chatforia from the start.
about.accessDesc: Chatforia helps people connect across languages, devices, and borders.
about.controlDesc: Choose how messages appear, when they disappear, and how your account stays protected.

press.title: Press
press.boilerplateBody: Chatforia eri privacy-first messaging app ey'okukyusa cross-language chat mu ngeri ey'angu. Obubaka bwa end-to-end encrypted by default, n'built-in translation ekozesa 100+ languages mu real time. Abakozesa basobola okutandika disappearing messages, kwata read receipts nga optional, n'sync ku devices. Available ku iOS, Android, n'web.
press.scanTip: Ku desktop? Skena n'essaamu yo ofune app.

careers.title: Careers
careers.intro: Tuli founding team entonotono etegula Chatforia — private, global messenger ey'okutandika ku web, iOS, n'Android. Nga oyagala privacy, encryption, n'delightful user experiences, tujja kusanyuka okuwulira okuva ku ggwe.
careers.openRoles: Open founding roles: Lead Full-stack Engineer, Backend Engineer (Node.js), Frontend/Web Engineer (React), Mobile Engineer (iOS), Mobile Engineer (Android), DevOps/SRE, Security & Encryption Engineer, Telecom Engineer (Twilio + eSIM).
careers.apply: Ntya okusaba: Kozesa button wansi okutuma resume yo n'links.
careers.whyBullets:
• Yamba okutegula foundation ya new global messenger.
• Ship improvements ezikozesebwa ku web, iOS, n'Android.
• Kozesa founder ku architecture n'product direction.
• Own high-impact areas: messaging, voice, video, encryption, telecom, AI.
• Jjira ku beginning — nga user base tekyaze.

advertise.title: Advertise n'Chatforia
advertise.description: Tuwe abakozesa ab'okwogera n'okuwandiika n'tasteful, brand-safe placements. Tuwadde banner inventory mu high-visibility spots, sponsorships, n'house promos. Premium subscribers tebalaba ads.

adsense.withPubIdShort: Tukozesa inventory via Google AdSense. Osobola okutarget Chatforia n'publisher ID {{pubId}}, oba kozesa form wansi ku direct sponsorships.
adsense.noPubIdShort: Tukozesa inventory via Google AdSense. Direct sponsorships zirinawo — kozesa form wansi.

advertise.noPlacementsPublic: Tuli mu kutegeka ad inventory yaffe. Tutegeeza ku campaign yo era tujja kukuwa recommendations ku placements.

why.highSession: High session frequency n'dwell time mu chat UI
why.deals: Direct deals oba programmatic via AdSense/Google Ads

form.mailtoInfo: Gulawo email client yo okutuma inquiry…

contact.errorSend: Could not send. Please email support@chatforia.com.

intro.body: This Privacy Policy explains how Chatforia (“we”, “us”) collects, uses, and shares information when you use our apps and services. We design Chatforia to minimize the data we can access.

infoWeCollect.title: Information we collect
infoWeCollect.account: Account info (e.g., email/phone) to create and secure your account.
infoWeCollect.encrypted: Encrypted content (messages/calls) is end-to-end encrypted; we can’t read it.
infoWeCollect.diagnostics: Diagnostic/usage like crash logs, device type, or coarse analytics to improve performance.

sms.title: Mobile phone numbers and SMS
sms.body: If you choose to provide a mobile phone number, we use it to enable features such as account verification, login alerts, and user-to-user messaging via SMS where supported. We may send transactional SMS messages related to your account and activity on Chatforia. You can opt out of receiving SMS messages at any time by replying with a supported opt-out keyword (such as “STOP”) or by changing your notification preferences in the app. We do not sell your phone number or use it for unrelated marketing.
sms.addRecipient: Add a recipient above to start…

howWeUse.title: How we use information
howWeUse.provide: Provide and secure the service (auth, spam/abuse detection).

sharing.title: Sharing
sharing.body: We don’t sell personal data. We may share limited data with processors (e.g., push notifications, analytics) under strict contracts.

rights.title: Your rights
rights.body: Depending on your region (e.g., GDPR/UK GDPR/CPRA), you may request access, correction, deletion, or opt-out of certain processing. Contact: privacy@chatforia.com.

retention.title: Data retention & security
retention.body: We retain only what’s needed to operate the service and apply industry-standard security. E2E content can’t be decrypted by us.

children.title: Children
children.body: Chatforia isn’t directed to children under 13 (or as required by your local law).

changes.title: Changes
changes.body: We’ll post updates here and revise the “Last updated” date.

contact.title: Contact
contact.body: privacy@chatforia.com • Chatforia LLC, 123 Example St, Sheridan, WY 82801, USA

intro.body: By using Chatforia you agree to these Terms. If you do not agree, don’t use the service.

accounts.title: Accounts
accounts.itemAccurateInfo: Provide accurate info and keep credentials secure.
accounts.itemResponsibility: You’re responsible for activity on your account.

acceptableUse.title: Acceptable use
acceptableUse.itemNoAbuse: No illegal, abusive, or infringing content; no spam or automated abuse.

sms.title: SMS communications
sms.body: If you provide a mobile phone number, you agree that Chatforia may send you SMS messages related to your account and use of the service, such as login alerts, security notifications, and messages related to conversations you initiate or participate in. We do not use SMS for promotional or marketing messages without your explicit consent. Standard message and data rates may apply. You can opt out of SMS messages at any time by replying with a supported opt-out keyword (for example, “STOP”) or by updating your notification settings in the app.

yourContent.title: Your content
yourContent.body: You retain rights to your content. You grant us necessary rights to operate the service (e.g., routing, storage, translation).

disclaimer.title: Disclaimers & liability
disclaimer.body: Service is provided “as is” without warranties. To the fullest extent permitted by law, Chatforia isn’t liable for indirect or consequential damages.

changes.title: Changes
changes.body: We may update these terms; continued use after changes means acceptance.

contact.title: Contact
contact.body: support@chatforia.com • Chatforia LLC, 123 Example St, Sheridan, WY 82801, USA

refund.title: Enkola y’Okuddamu Ssente
refund.intro: Ku Chatforia, tugezaako okuwa empeereza ey’omutindo eri bonna. Enkola eno eraga ddi ssente lwe zisobola okuddamu okuweebwa.

subscriptions.title: Okwewandiisa (Subscriptions)
subscriptions.body: Okwewandiisa kusasulwa nga bukyali era ne kuddamu buli kiseera. Osobola okukulemesa buli kiseera ng’oyita mu nteekateeka za akawunti yo oba ku platform gy’oguliddeko.

eligibility.title: Obusobozi bw’Okuddamu Ssente
eligibility.body: Ssente zisobola okuddamu okuweebwa singa wabaawo okusasula emirundi ebiri, ensobi mu kusasula, oba obuzibu obulemesa okufuna eby’okukozesa ebyasasuliddwa. Buli kusaba kulowoozebwako ku mbeera yaako.

nonRefundable.title: Ebitaddizibwa
nonRefundable.body: Mu ngeri eya bulijjo, tetuddamu ssente ku biseera ebyo ebitali bakozesezza, ku bitundu by’okwewandiisa, oba ku kulemwa okukulemesa nga tekunnaba kuddamu kusasula.

thirdParty.title: Ebyagulwa mu mikono gy’abalala
thirdParty.body: Singa wagula okuyita ku mikutu egy’abantu abalala nga Apple App Store, olina okusaba okuddamu ssente ng’oyita ku mikutu egyo.

contact.title: Tukwatagana
contact.body: support@chatforia.com • Chatforia LLC, 30 N Gould Street STE N, Sheridan, WY 82801, USA

doNotSell.title: Do Not Sell or Share My Personal Information
doNotSell.body: Chatforia does not sell personal information. California residents can still submit requests under CPRA using the button below.

cookies.title: Cookie Settings
cookies.body: Chatforia uses minimal cookies (e.g., session, security). We don’t use third-party ads cookies. Manage cookies via your browser’s settings.

whatWeSend.title: What we send
whatWeSend.body: Chatforia sends only account-related and conversational SMS to phone numbers a user has explicitly provided and consented to. Typical messages include login/verification codes, message delivery alerts, security notices, and transactional account updates.

optIn.title: How users opt in
optIn.body: Users opt in by entering their phone number during registration and checking the SMS consent checkbox on the registration page or the dedicated

optOut.title: How users opt out
optOut.stop: Reply STOP to any Chatforia SMS to opt out.

help.title: Help
help.bodyPrefix: Reply HELP for assistance or email

privacyTerms.bodyStart: By consenting to SMS, users also agree to our
